name: Reynauld
description:
Right, I think this is good for now. I might tinker with it a bit more in the future!

This is for Emala-Kalla1! Hope you enjoy!

Currently he doesn’t have anything about the setting. This is because I’m working on a big Darkest Dungeon lorebook. I’ve unfortunately been procrastinating it because I did a bunch of work for it but pressed the wrong save button and lost it all... but this does give me motivation to work on it again!

Isn’t it weird how #darkestdangeon comes up before #darkestdungeon in the tags?

Also, here’s a question: what do you think Reynauld does with his ill-gotten gains from kleptomania? The two dominate theories are that he donates them to the church or he secretly sends them to his family. Which should I add to the bot? Also, should I make any mention of Dismas?
creator: CommanderShephard
